# Wayfarer

- **Ability Scores:** Dexterity, Wisdom, Charisma
- **Feat:** [[lucky]]
- **Skill Proficiencies:** [[insight]], [[stealth]]
- **Tool Proficiency:** [[thieves_tools|Thieves' Tools]]
- **Equipment:** Choose A or B: (A) [[dagger|2 Daggers]], [[thieves_tools|Thieves' Tools]], Gaming Set (any), [[bedroll]], [[pouch|2 Pouches]], [[traveler_s_clothes|Traveler's Clothes]], 16 GP; or (B) 50 GP
